summary: sev0-001's scope_check predicates mostly FAIL (5 of 6 false), but the record itself is the required audit-trail companion to dev-001 (which has changes_artifact:true). v1.3 Sev 0 rule (must be trivial) collides with v1.4 inline-deviation rule (artifact-modifying deviation requires Sev 0 companion).

evidence.self_disclosure: note_on_scope_check field: 'This is NOT a true Sev 0 trivial fix — it's recorded here as the audit-trail companion to dev-001.'

proposed_resolution: Architecture amendment candidate for v1.13: clarify the v1.4 + v1.3 interaction. Option (i): require an escalation packet (Sev 2b) instead of a Sev 0 companion for substantive artifact-changing inline deviations. Option (ii): introduce a new sev0-fixes/{nnn}.json subtype 'audit_companion' that is exempt from the trivial-fix predicates and is purely a back-pointer to the inline-deviation record. Recommend (ii) — preserves the audit-trail discoverability that v1.4 was designed for, distinguishes substantive artifact changes from trivial fixes, and makes Critic's future Sev 0 audit predicates well-defined.
notes_for_arbiter: Medium severity — honest disclosure rules out sneak-intent misuse; the record itself names dev-001 as the canonical artifact-modification source. Architecture-level question routed for amendment evaluation post-delivery; should not block this build.
